meaning: migrant worker (who moved from a rural area of China to a city to find
sentence: 很多民工春节前会赶回老家。
pinyin: Hěn duō míngōng Chūnjié qián huì gǎn huí lǎojiā.
english: Many migrant workers rush back to their hometowns before the Spring Festival.

sentence: 我小时候经常住在外婆家。
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎoshíhòu jīngcháng zhù zài wàipó jiā.
english: I often stayed at my grandma's house when I was little.

sentence: 你帮了我这么大的忙，非常感谢！
pinyin: Nǐ bāng le wǒ zhème dà de máng, fēicháng gǎnxiè!
english: You've helped me so much — I'm extremely grateful!

sentence: 车站以西两公里就是我家。
pinyin: Chēzhàn yǐ xī liǎng gōnglǐ jiù shì wǒ jiā.
english: My home is two kilometers to the west of the station.

sentence: 他去商业银行开了一个储蓄账户。
pinyin: Tā qù shāngyè yínháng kāi le yīgè chǔxù zhànghù.
english: He opened a savings account at a commercial bank.
